title: European Commission and Europa Nostra spotlight Europe’s best heritage projects and champions at European cultural event in Nicosia
content:
Press release  | Photos | Video recording

The 30 winners of the 2026 European Heritage Awards / Europa Nostra Awards, the highest heritage accolade in Europe, were celebrated this evening during a high-profile event held at the Nicosia Municipal Theatre, Cyprus.

title: Europa Nostra awards its Medal of Honour to Androulla Vassiliou and the A. G. Leventis Foundation at ceremony in Nicosia
content:
Press release (English – Greek) | Photos | Video recording

Europa Nostra, the leading European heritage civil society organisation, granted its highest recognition – the Europa Nostra Medal of Honour – to Androulla Vassiliou and the A. G. Leventis Foundation for their outstanding contributions to the promotion of the organisation’s mission and action, during the European Heritage Awards Cer
